title: AI SOFTWARE ENGINEER
company_focus: Hard seltzer & tea with AI products
description:
Job Description:

We’re building AI-first products from the ground up, not
bolting AI onto existing workflows. Our goal is to replace
slow, manual processes with intelligent systems that think,
adapt, and improve over time. You’ll be helping define how
AI is used in our product, not just implementing tickets.

Responsibilities:

● Build, ship, and iterate on AI-powered features end to end

● Design and deploy machine learning models that solve real
problems

● Work closely with product and engineering to turn ideas
into working software

● Integrate models into production systems (APIs, services,
workflows)

● Experiment with new tools, models, and approaches and keep
what works

● Improve performance, reliability, and scalability as we
grow

Requirements:

● Strong software engineering fundamentals and experience
building real products

● Solid Python skills

● Hands-on experience with ML frameworks like PyTorch,
TensorFlow, or similar

● Comfort working in cloud environments

● Ability to move fast, make tradeoffs, and own your work

● Clear communicator who plays well with others

Job Type: Full-time, Remote

Pay: $80,000 - $100,000

Benefits:

- PTO
- Health / Dental / Vision
- 401(k) Plans

Work closely with product and engineering to turn ideas into working software

Experiment with new tools, models, and approaches and keep what works

use_cases: Replace slow, manual processes with intelligent systems

ai_classification_reasoning:
The role involves building AI-first products from the ground
up and directly working with ML frameworks (PyTorch,
TensorFlow). The engineer will design, deploy, and integrate
ML models into production systems to solve real problems,
not just support infrastructure or data pipelines.
